message:
fix: re-add region.rs and debug.rs incorrectly deleted in db9be20

Commit db9be20 ("refactor: remove dead code") incorrectly deleted
src/record/region.rs (1498 lines) and src/web/debug.rs (517 lines),
causing 53 compile errors. Both files are actively used throughout
the codebase. Retrieved from parent commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
